name: heroquarium-artgen
description: Isometric pixel-art generation for the Heroquarium game: terrain biomes, organic lake shorelines, houses (log to stone, 1-2 storeys), decor/props, trees, and animated actors (villagers, animals, enemies) with 4-direction walk cycles, plus baked effect animations (smoke, campfire, window-glow, water) — all via MCP tools.
